text.message: Green will take road and plow me why are you robbing me
this has been the slowest game ever, anyone can win from here

you have 2 cities 2 knights and miles ahead
yeah i'm going for road, but not plowing anyone, and you have largest army easy and will be on 6
And I have nowhere to settle basically

I just wanna know if you are trolling me because you are angry
